ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "sqft_living" INTEGER /* Living area square footage */,
  "sqft_lot" INTEGER /* Lot size square footage */,
  "floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors */,
  "waterfront" INTEGER /* Waterfront indicator */,
  "view" INTEGER /* View indicator */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition of the property */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade of the property */,
  "sqft_above" INTEGER /* Square footage above ground */,
  "sqft_basement" INTEGER /* Square footage of basement */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "year_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was renovated */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode of the property */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the property */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the property */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the property */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location of the property */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., 'For Sale', 'Sold', 'Under Contract') */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent listing the property */,
  "listing_price" INTEGER /* Price at which the property is listed */,
  "sold_price" INTEGER /* Final sale price of the property */,
  "tax_assessment" INTEGER /* Tax assessment value of the property */,
  "hoa_fees" INTEGER /* Homeowners Association fees */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zipcode" INTEGER /* Zipcode of the location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the property is located */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the area */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_amenities" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownerships" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the property was purchased */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "purchase_price" INTEGER /* Price at which the property was purchased */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Price at which the property was sold */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent involved in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownerships_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownerships_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renovations" (
  "renovation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renovation record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "renovation_date" TEXT /* Date the renovation was completed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the renovation */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the renovation */,
  "contractor" TEXT /* Name of the contractor who performed the renovation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renovation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_renovations_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "points_of_interest" (
  "poi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point of interest */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "poi_name" TEXT /* Name of the point of interest */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from the property to the point of interest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_of_interest_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "sale_price" INTEGER /* Price the property was sold for */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent involved in the sale */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned by the agent */,
  "closing_cost" INTEGER /* Closing costs associated with the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., 'active', 'inactive') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
